title: castalia odorata var. minor
intro: Castalia odorata var. minor, also known as the lesser castalia or minor castalia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Alstroemeriaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Castalia odorata var. minor include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
